calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-01-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 30, 2014 admitted to probate. Susan Sexton is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 21, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cece. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Continued To Dec-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
